idea_ref: [R2.MAXLEN] ST3 base + synth_v002 only with max_len=384 (was 256). Clean comparison to exp_0068 (v002+v003) to isolate v003 effect at 384.
hypothesis: max_len=384 on ST3 base with v002-only synth. Lets us compare against exp_0068 (v002+v003@384) to see if v003's pi regression persists at longer context. Baseline exp_0060=0.484 at 256.
